ai.description: Orb expands and pulses when AI is speaking

customer.description: Orb creates ripple effect when customer speaks

human_agent.description: Gentle pulse when human agent joins

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Welcome to Godrej Capital. I'm here to help you find the perfect financial solution.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Haan ji, namaste. Main apke paas loan ke bare mein poochna chahta hoon.

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Bilkul! What type of loan are you looking for? Business, personal, or property-based?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Meri nai business hai. Business loan chahiye mujhe.

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Great! Business loans are perfect for new ventures. How long has your business been operating?

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Perfect! With 2 years of operation, you're eligible for our business loan program. What's your approximate annual revenue?

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Excellent! Based on your profile, you could qualify for up to 25 lakhs. Would you like to proceed with the application?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Haan, bilkul. Aage kya karna hoga?

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: I'll connect you with our loan specialist who can guide you through the process. They'll collect the necessary documents and help you complete the application.

transcript.speaker: human_agent
transcript.text: Hello! I'm Rajesh from our loan team. I see you're interested in a business loan for your startup.

transcript.speaker: human_agent
transcript.text: We'll process your application and you should hear back within 5-7 business days. In the meantime, please gather your business registration and financial documents.
